message:
test(e2e): add join-cancel regression test for JoinFuture early return

Adds a test that verifies JoinFuture does NOT return early when
the parent Cx is cancelled. This guards against a subtle bug where
cancel propagation could cause join handles to resolve prematurely
instead of waiting for the child task to actually complete or be
explicitly cancelled.

The test:
- Creates a root region with a pending (never-completing) task
- Sets cancel_requested on the parent Cx
- Polls the JoinFuture once and asserts it remains Pending
- Panics with a clear "BUG" message if the future resolves early

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
